---
title: "Writing"
subtitle: "Thoughts on machine learning, LLMs, and building things that work."
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

## Weights & Biases Reports

Technical articles and tutorials I've written on the W&B platform—covering deep learning, computer vision, LLMs, and practical ML engineering.

::: {.wandb-reports}

**LLMs & RLHF**

- [Understanding Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF): Part 1](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/RLHF/reports/Understanding-Reinforcement-Learning-from-Human-Feedback-RLHF-Part-1--VmlldzoyODk5MTIx)
- [An Introduction to Training LLMs Using Reinforcement Learning From Human Feedback (RLHF)](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/Intro-RLAIF/reports/An-Introduction-to-Training-LLMs-Using-Reinforcement-Learning-From-Human-Feedback-RLHF---VmlldzozMzYyNjcy)
- [How to Evaluate, Compare, and Optimize LLM Systems](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/llm-eval-sweep/reports/How-to-Evaluate-Compare-and-Optimize-LLM-Systems--Vmlldzo0NzgyMTQz)
- [Building Advanced Query Engine and Evaluation with LlamaIndex and W&B](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/llama-index-report/reports/Building-Advanced-Query-Engine-and-Evaluation-with-LlamaIndex-and-W-B--Vmlldzo0OTIzMjMy)
- [Implementing RLHF: Learning to Summarize with trlX](https://wandb.ai/carperai/summarize_RLHF/reports/Implementing-RLHF-Learning-to-Summarize-with-trlX--VmlldzozMzAwODM2)
- [RLHF: Hyperparameter Optimization for trlX](https://wandb.ai/ayut/trlx-ppo-sentiments-hyperopt/reports/RLHF-Hyperparameter-Optimization-for-trlX--VmlldzoyOTgxMTQ2)

**Computer Vision & GANs**

- [Towards Deep Generative Modeling With Weight & Biases](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/keras-gan/reports/Towards-Deep-Generative-Modeling-With-Weight-Biases--Vmlldzo4MDI4Mw)
- [How to Evaluate GANs using Frechet Inception Distance (FID)](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/gan-evaluation/reports/How-to-Evaluate-GANs-using-Frechet-Inception-Distance-FID---Vmlldzo0MTAxOTI)
- [Train Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) With Limited Data](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/ada/reports/Train-Generative-Adversarial-Networks-GANs-With-Limited-Data--Vmlldzo1NDYyMjA)
- [In-Domain GAN Inversion for Real Image Editing](https://wandb.ai/wandb/in-domain-gan/reports/In-Domain-GAN-Inversion-for-Real-Image-Editing--VmlldzoyODE5Mzk)
- [An Introduction to Adversarial Latent Autoencoders](https://wandb.ai/authors/alae/reports/An-Introduction-to-Adversarial-Latent-Autoencoders--VmlldzoxNDA2MDY)
- [Interpretability in Deep Learning With Weights & Biases: CAM and Grad-CAM](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/interpretability/reports/Interpretability-in-Deep-Learning-With-Weights-Biases-CAM-and-Grad-CAM--Vmlldzo5MTIyNw)
- [An Overview of Instance Aware Image Colorization](https://wandb.ai/wandb/instacolorization/reports/An-Overview-of-Instance-Aware-Image-Colorization---VmlldzoyOTk3MDI)
- [Image Segmentation Using Keras and Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/image-segmentation/reports/Image-Segmentation-Using-Keras-and-Weights-Biases--VmlldzoyNTE1Njc)
- [Object Localization With Keras and Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/wandb/object_localization/reports/Object-Localization-With-Keras-and-Weights-Biases--VmlldzoyNzA2Mzk)
- [Image Classification Using Vision Transformer and KerasCV](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/keras_cv_vit/reports/Image-Classification-Using-Vision-Transformer-and-KerasCV--VmlldzozNTE4MzMz)

**PyTorch & PyTorch Lightning**

- [How To Use GPU with PyTorch](https://wandb.ai/wandb/common-ml-errors/reports/How-To-Use-GPU-with-PyTorch---VmlldzozMzAxMDk)
- [How to save and load models in PyTorch](https://wandb.ai/wandb/common-ml-errors/reports/How-to-save-and-load-models-in-PyTorch--VmlldzozMjg0MTE)
- [How To Check If PyTorch Is Using The GPU](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/How-To-Check-If-PyTorch-Is-Using-The-GPU--VmlldzoyMDQ0NTU)
- [Image Classification Using PyTorch Lightning and Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/wandb/wandb-lightning/reports/Image-Classification-Using-PyTorch-Lightning-and-Weights-Biases--VmlldzoyODk1NzY)
- [Transfer Learning Using PyTorch Lightning](https://wandb.ai/wandb/wandb-lightning/reports/Transfer-Learning-Using-PyTorch-Lightning--VmlldzoyODk2MjA)
- [Multi-GPU Training Using PyTorch Lightning](https://wandb.ai/wandb/wandb-lightning/reports/Multi-GPU-Training-Using-PyTorch-Lightning--VmlldzozMTk3NTk)
- [An Introduction To The PyTorch View Function](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/An-Introduction-To-The-PyTorch-View-Function--VmlldzoyMDM0Nzg)
- [PyTorch Dropout for regularization - tutorial](https://wandb.ai/authors/ayusht/reports/PyTorch-Dropout-for-regularization-tutorial---VmlldzoxNTgwOTE)
- [Implementing and Tracking the Performance of a CNN in PyTorch](https://wandb.ai/authors/ayusht/reports/Implementing-and-Tracking-the-Performance-of-a-CNN-in-PyTorch---VmlldzoxNjEyMDU)

**Keras & TensorFlow**

- [Keras Dense Layer: How to Use It Correctly](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/keras-dense/reports/Keras-Dense-Layer-How-to-Use-It-Correctly--Vmlldzo0MjAzNDY1)
- [Input Keras Layer Explanation With Code Samples](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/Input-Keras-Layer-Explanation-With-Code-Samples--VmlldzoyMDIzMDU)
- [Batch Normalization in Keras - An Example](https://wandb.ai/authors/ayusht/reports/Batch-Normalization-in-Keras-An-Example--VmlldzoxNzI5NjQ)
- [How to Use Cosine Decay Learning Rate Scheduler in Keras](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/cosine_decay/reports/How-to-Use-Cosine-Decay-Learning-Rate-Scheduler-in-Keras--VmlldzozNTE4MDMy)
- [Using GPUs With Keras: A Tutorial With Code](https://wandb.ai/authors/ayusht/reports/Using-GPUs-With-Keras-A-Tutorial-With-Code--VmlldzoxNjEyNjE)
- [Integrating Keras with Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/medmnist-bloodmnist/reports/Integrating-Keras-with-Weights-Biases--VmlldzoxNDg1MDQy)
- [How To Install TensorFlow With GPU Support on Windows](https://wandb.ai/wandb/common-ml-errors/reports/How-To-Install-TensorFlow-With-GPU-Support-on-Windows--VmlldzozMDYxMDQ)
- [How to Prevent TensorFlow From Fully Allocating GPU Memory](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/How-to-Prevent-TensorFlow-From-Fully-Allocating-GPU-Memory--VmlldzoxOTk1ODE)
- [LSTM RNN in Keras: Examples of One-to-Many, Many-to-One & Many-to-Many](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/LSTM-RNN-in-Keras-Examples-of-One-to-Many-Many-to-One-Many-to-Many---VmlldzoyMDIzOTM)
- [A Guide to Multi-Label Classification on Keras](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/A-Guide-to-Multi-Label-Classification-on-Keras--VmlldzoyMDgyMDU)

**HuggingFace & Transformers**

- [How To Fine-Tune Hugging Face Transformers on a Custom Dataset](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/huggingface/reports/How-To-Fine-Tune-Hugging-Face-Transformers-on-a-Custom-Dataset--Vmlldzo0MzQ2MDc)
- [Examples of Early Stopping in HuggingFace Transformers](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/huggingface/reports/Examples-of-Early-Stopping-in-HuggingFace-Transformers--Vmlldzo0MzE2MTM)
- [SimpleTransformers: Transformers Made Easy](https://wandb.ai/wandb/gallery/reports/SimpleTransformers-Transformers-Made-Easy--VmlldzoyNDQzNTg)
- [Taming Transformers for High-Resolution Image Synthesis](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/taming-transformer/reports/Taming-Transformers-for-High-Resolution-Image-Synthesis---Vmlldzo0NjEyMTY)

**Deep Learning Fundamentals**

- [What's the Optimal Batch Size to Train a Neural Network?](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/What-s-the-Optimal-Batch-Size-to-Train-a-Neural-Network---VmlldzoyMDkyNDU)
- [ReLU vs. Sigmoid Function in Deep Neural Networks](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/ReLU-vs-Sigmoid-Function-in-Deep-Neural-Networks--VmlldzoyMDk0MzI)
- [How to Handle Images of Different Sizes in a Convolutional Neural Network](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/How-to-Handle-Images-of-Different-Sizes-in-a-Convolutional-Neural-Network--VmlldzoyMDk3NzQ)
- [Intuitive understanding of 1D, 2D, and 3D convolutions in convolutional neural networks](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/Intuitive-understanding-of-1D-2D-and-3D-convolutions-in-convolutional-neural-networks---VmlldzoxOTk2MDA)
- [What's the Difference Between Strided Convolution and Pooling?](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/What-s-the-Difference-Between-Strided-Convolution-and-Pooling---VmlldzoyMDE5Mjc)
- [Comparing Sigmoid-MSE With Softmax Cross-Entropy for Image Classification](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/Comparing-Sigmoid-MSE-With-Softmax-Cross-Entropy-for-Image-Classification--VmlldzoyMDA3ODQ)
- [How One-Hot Encoding Improves Machine Learning Performance](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/dl-question-bank/reports/How-One-Hot-Encoding-Improves-Machine-Learning-Performance--VmlldzoxOTkzMDk)
- [Understanding the Effectivity of Ensembles in Deep Learning](https://wandb.ai/authors/loss-landscape/reports/Understanding-the-Effectivity-of-Ensembles-in-Deep-Learning--VmlldzoxODAxNjA)

**Data Augmentation & Training Techniques**

- [Modern Data Augmentation Techniques for Computer Vision](https://wandb.ai/authors/tfaugmentation/reports/Modern-Data-Augmentation-Techniques-for-Computer-Vision--VmlldzoxODA3NTQ)
- [Simple Ways to Tackle Class Imbalance](https://wandb.ai/authors/class-imbalance/reports/Simple-Ways-to-Tackle-Class-Imbalance--VmlldzoxODA3NTk)
- [Exploring Adaptive Gradient Clipping and NFNets](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/nfnet/reports/Exploring-Adaptive-Gradient-Clipping-and-NFNets--Vmlldzo1MDc0NTQ)
- [Metric Learning for Image Search With Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/metric-learning/reports/Metric-Learning-for-Image-Search-With-Weights-Biases--VmlldzoyNTM0NDc)
- [How to avoid checkerboard pattern in your generated images?](https://wandb.ai/wandb/common-ml-errors/reports/How-to-avoid-checkerboard-pattern-in-your-generated-images---VmlldzozNTEzNzk)

**3D Vision & Novel View Synthesis**

- [3D Image Inpainting With Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai/authors/3D-Inpainting/reports/3D-Image-Inpainting-With-Weights-Biases--VmlldzoxNzIwNTY)
- [Paper Summary: One Shot 3D Photography](https://wandb.ai/authors/One-Shot-3D-Photography/reports/Paper-Summary-One-Shot-3D-Photography--VmlldzozNjE2MjQ)
- [X-Fields: Implicit Neural View-, Light- and Time-Image Interpolation](https://wandb.ai/wandb/xfields/reports/X-Fields-Implicit-Neural-View-Light-and-Time-Image-Interpolation--Vmlldzo0MTY0MzM)
- [Overview: Neural Scene Flow Fields (NSFF) for Space-Time View Synthesis of Dynamic Scenes](https://wandb.ai/wandb/NSFF/reports/Overview-Neural-Scene-Flow-Fields-NSFF-for-Space-Time-View-Synthesis-of-Dynamic-Scenes--Vmlldzo1NzA1ODI)
- [Dynamic Sky Replacement: The Sky Is Within Our Grasp!](https://wandb.ai/wandb/skyAR/reports/Dynamic-Sky-Replacement-The-Sky-Is-Within-Our-Grasp---VmlldzozMjY0NDI)

**Video & Animation**

- [One-Shot Free-View Neural Talking-Head Synthesis for Video Conferencing](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/face-vid2vid/reports/One-Shot-Free-View-Neural-Talking-Head-Synthesis-for-Video-Conferencing--Vmlldzo1MzU4ODc)
- [An Introduction to Egocentric Videoconferencing](https://wandb.ai/wandb/egocentric-video-conferencing/reports/An-Introduction-to-Egocentric-Videoconferencing--VmlldzozMTY1NTA)
- [An Intro to Retiming Instances in a Video](https://wandb.ai/wandb/retiming-video/reports/An-Intro-to-Retiming-Instances-in-a-Video--VmlldzozMzUwNTk)
- [Automating Animations with the Help of Robust In-Betweening](https://wandb.ai/wandb/in-between/reports/Automating-Animations-with-the-Help-of-Robust-In-Betweening--Vmlldzo0MzkzMzA)

**Other**

- [Self-Supervised Learning with SwAV](https://wandb.ai/authors/swav-tf/reports/Unsupervised-Visual-Representation-Learning-with-SwAV--VmlldzoyMjg3Mzg)
- [How To Use Weights & Biases With MMDetection](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/mmdetection/reports/How-To-Use-Weights-Biases-With-MMDetection--VmlldzoyMTM0MDE2)
- [Generating Digital Painting Lighting Effects via RGB-space Geometry](https://wandb.ai/ayush-thakur/paintlight/reports/Generating-Digital-Painting-Lighting-Effects-via-RGB-space-Geometry--VmlldzoxMTA2Mjg)
- [An Overview of DeepFaceDrawing](https://wandb.ai/authors/deepfacedrawing/reports/An-Overview-of-DeepFaceDrawing--VmlldzoyMjgxNzM)
- [Rewriting a Deep Generative Model: An Overview](https://wandb.ai/authors/rewrite-gan/reports/Rewriting-a-Deep-Generative-Model-An-Overview--VmlldzoyMzgyNTU)
- [From EMNIST to Wikisplit: Sentence Composition Using W&B](https://wandb.ai/wandb/emnist/reports/From-EMNIST-to-Wikisplit-Sentence-Composition-Using-W-B--VmlldzoyMjE3MjE)
- [Modeling Drivable Areas for Autonomous Vehicles with Real and Synthetic Data](https://wandb.ai/av-team/drivable-segmentation/reports/Modeling-Drivable-Areas-for-Autonomous-Vehicles-with-Real-and-Synthetic-Data--VmlldzoyNjE0MjE2)

:::

---

## Medium

::: {.wandb-reports}

- [Converting FC Layers to Conv Layers](https://medium.com/@mein2work/converting-fc-layers-to-conv-layers-8a43880a44ed)
- [Using CNN to translate American Sign Language](https://medium.com/@mein2work/using-cnn-to-translate-american-sign-language-10d6443f7cd)

:::

---

## Kaggle Notebooks

::: {.wandb-reports}

- [[Train] COVID-19 Detection using YOLOv5](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-covid-19-detection-using-yolov5) (800 upvotes)
- [Experiment Tracking with Weights and Biases](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/experiment-tracking-with-weights-and-biases) (420 upvotes)
- [[Train] Brain Tumor as Video Classification + W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-brain-tumor-as-video-classification-w-b) (175 upvotes)
- [[Train] NFL Extra Images YOLOv5 with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-nfl-extra-images-yolov5-with-w-b) (174 upvotes)
- [Brain Tumor EDA and Interactive Viz with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/brain-tumor-eda-and-interactive-viz-with-w-b) (158 upvotes)
- [Train YOLOv5 + Cross Validation + Ensemble + W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-yolov5-cross-validation-ensemble-w-b) (155 upvotes)
- [TPS June [Weights and Biases]](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/tps-june-weights-and-biases) (148 upvotes)
- [Submission Covid19](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/submission-covid19) (132 upvotes)
- [[G2Net] Understand the Data](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/g2net-understand-the-data) (129 upvotes)
- [SD 2.0: Download Dataset from W&B Artifacts](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/sd-2-0-download-dataset-from-w-b-artifacts) (111 upvotes)
- [Visualize Bounding Boxes Interactively](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/visualize-bounding-boxes-interactively) (111 upvotes)
- [[V2] Self-Supervised Pretraining with SwAV](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/v2-self-supervised-pretraining-with-swav) (103 upvotes)
- [EfficientNet+Mixup+K-Fold using TF and wandb](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/efficientnet-mixup-k-fold-using-tf-and-wandb) (63 upvotes)
- [HPA: Segmentation Mask Visualization with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/hpa-segmentation-mask-visualization-with-w-b) (62 upvotes)
- [Comparative Study: SETI Experiments](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/comparative-study-seti-experiments) (61 upvotes)
- [Create Constant Q Transformed Dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/create-constant-q-transformed-dataset) (51 upvotes)
- [HPA: Multi-Label Classification with TF and W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/hpa-multi-label-classification-with-tf-and-w-b) (50 upvotes)
- [Easy PCA TSNE and UMAP](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/easy-pca-tsne-and-umap) (49 upvotes)
- [[Train] Study Level Classifier + W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-study-level-classifier-w-b) (49 upvotes)
- [[Train] COTS Detection using YOLOv5 and W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-cots-detection-using-yolov5-and-w-b) (49 upvotes)
- [Quick Data EDA+ Segmentation Viz using W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/quick-data-eda-segmentation-viz-using-w-b) (49 upvotes)
- [[Train][PyTorch] FineTune ConvNeXt](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-pytorch-finetune-convnext) (44 upvotes)
- [[Train] TensorFlow+EfficientNet+Kfold+W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-tensorflow-efficientnet-kfold-w-b) (42 upvotes)
- [Use PyTorch Lightning With Weights and Biases](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/use-pytorch-lightning-with-weights-and-biases) (41 upvotes)
- [Visualize the COTS interactively with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/visualize-the-cots-interactively-with-w-b) (36 upvotes)
- [[MLOps Tutorial] XGBoost with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/mlops-tutorial-xgboost-with-w-b) (36 upvotes)
- [TensorFlow Inference [No-TTA]](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/tensorflow-inference-no-tta) (28 upvotes)
- [BirdCLEF: Quick EDA with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/birdclef-quick-eda-with-w-b) (26 upvotes)
- [APTOS Blindness Detection - EDA and Keras ResNet50](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/aptos-blindness-detection-eda-and-keras-resnet50) (25 upvotes)
- [Interactive EDA using W&B Tables](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/interactive-eda-using-w-b-tables) (23 upvotes)
- [Cassava 2019+2020 Dataset Prep+Versioning w/ W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/cassava-2019-2020-dataset-prep-versioning-w-w-b) (23 upvotes)
- [GradCAM: Implementation+Visualization in TF & W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/gradcam-implementation-visualization-in-tf-w-b) (22 upvotes)
- [XGBoost Hyperparameter Tuning with W&B Sweeps](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/xgboost-hyperparameter-tuning-with-w-b-sweeps) (22 upvotes)
- [Train EfficientNetv2 with TF and W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/train-efficientnetv2-with-tf-and-w-b) (20 upvotes)
- [[HappyWhale] EDA - IDs to Images using W&B Tables](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/happywhale-eda-ids-to-images-using-w-b-tables) (19 upvotes)
- [Ubiquant EDA](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/ubiquant-eda) (18 upvotes)
- [Transformer Baseline with TF/Keras and W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/transformer-baseline-with-tf-keras-and-w-b) (18 upvotes)
- [Get the most out of LightGBM using W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/get-the-most-out-of-lightgbm-using-w-b) (17 upvotes)
- [Sartorius: Instance Mask Viz with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/sartorius-instance-mask-viz-with-w-b) (16 upvotes)
- [[TensorFlow] Working with TIFF](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/tensorflow-working-with-tiff) (15 upvotes)
- [Rainforest Create Image Dataset with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/rainforest-create-image-dataset-with-w-b) (14 upvotes)
- [Resampled Voxel Dataset - with KaggleRecipes (W&B)](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/resampled-voxel-dataset-with-kagglerecipes-w-b) (14 upvotes)
- [AutoEncoders implementation](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/autoencoders-implementation) (13 upvotes)
- [G2Net: Quick EDA and CQT + W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/g2net-quick-eda-and-cqt-w-b) (13 upvotes)
- [Style Transfer using CycleGAN with TF and W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/style-transfer-using-cyclegan-with-tf-and-w-b) (13 upvotes)
- [BMS: EDA and Dataset Visualization w/ W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/bms-eda-and-dataset-visualization-w-w-b) (12 upvotes)
- [Single Label Cell Label Dataset Creation w/ W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/single-label-cell-label-dataset-creation-w-w-b) (12 upvotes)
- [Comparing Different Modeling Methods w/ W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/comparing-different-modeling-methods-w-w-b) (11 upvotes)
- [Better Data Understanding with W&B Tables](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/better-data-understanding-with-w-b-tables) (10 upvotes)
- [HPA: Inference](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/hpa-inference) (10 upvotes)
- [Investigate Imgur5k dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/investigate-imgur5k-dataset) (10 upvotes)
- [Images to TFRecord](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/images-to-tfrecord) (10 upvotes)
- [Experiment Tracking w/ Weights and Biases [Russia]](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/experiment-tracking-w-weights-and-biases-russia) (10 upvotes)
- [Rainforest Train Baseline Model with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/rainforest-train-baseline-model-with-w-b) (9 upvotes)
- [All in one MLB Quick EDA with W&B Tables](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/all-in-one-mlb-quick-eda-with-w-b-tables) (8 upvotes)
- [RGB 512x512 Dataset Creation+Versioning with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/rgb-512x512-dataset-creation-versioning-with-w-b) (7 upvotes)
- [Save the Dataset as W&B Artifacts](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/save-the-dataset-as-w-b-artifacts) (7 upvotes)
- [Visualize Dataset Interactively using W&B Tables](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/visualize-dataset-interactively-using-w-b-tables) (6 upvotes)
- [Dataset Versioning for Single Label Dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/dataset-versioning-for-single-label-dataset) (6 upvotes)
- [Testing W&B Offline Flow](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/testing-w-b-offline-flow) (6 upvotes)
- [Batch Normalization ft Batch Size with W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/batch-normalization-ft-batch-size-with-w-b) (6 upvotes)
- [Jigsaw BERT Model](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/jigsaw-bert-model) (5 upvotes)
- [Rainforest: Which model is better?](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/rainforest-which-model-is-better) (5 upvotes)
- [Adaptive Gradient Clipping: Ablation Study w/ W&B](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/adaptive-gradient-clipping-ablation-study-w-w-b) (5 upvotes)
- [Using W&B DSViz for Cell Level Dataset Creation](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/using-w-b-dsviz-for-cell-level-dataset-creation) (5 upvotes)
- [Kaggle Survey 2020: W&B vs All](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/kaggle-survey-2020-w-b-vs-all) (5 upvotes)
- [Kaggle Survey 2021: W&B vs All](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/kaggle-survey-2021-w-b-vs-all) (5 upvotes)
- [Cell Level Extra Data Download](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/cell-level-extra-data-download) (5 upvotes)
- [Test wandbcode](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/test-wandbcode) (4 upvotes)
- [Multiprocessing 5 Second Audio Clips](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/multiprocessing-5-second-audio-clips) (4 upvotes)
- [HuBMAP: TF with TPU EfficientUNetB7 512x512 [Train]](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/hubmap-tf-with-tpu-efficientunetb7-512x512-train) (4 upvotes)
- [CommonLit Readability Prize: EDA + Baseline](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/commonlit-readability-prize-eda-baseline) (3 upvotes)
- [Visualize the Dataset using W&B Tables](https://www.kaggle.com/code/ayuraj/visualize-the-dataset-using-w-b-tables) (3 upvotes)

:::
